overview: DukaanBazar is a professional multi-vendor local clothing marketplace where shop owners can list their sarees, kurtis, lehengas and more, and customers can browse, search, and order from local shops online.
features: Multi-vendor shop pages with product listings
Search and filter by category and price
Stripe online payment and WhatsApp ordering
Seller dashboard to manage products and orders
Customer order history and payment confirmation
About and Contact pages for trust and engagement
